pi_items.source: Task specification verified against Chinook database schema. Track.UnitPrice (NUMERIC(10,2)) exists, Invoice.Total (NUMERIC(10,2)) exists, Customer.Email (NVARCHAR(60)) exists. All constraints are properly named and reference valid columns.

Verified against Chinook schema. Customer.Country column exists (NVARCHAR(40)). 13 out of 59 customers (22%) are from USA, making it a reasonable default. Value is correctly quoted as SQL string literal.

Task description specifies table creation with schema: RuleId (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY), TableName (VARCHAR(100)), RuleName (VARCHAR(100)), RuleDescription (VARCHAR(500)), IsActive (BOOLEAN). Schema is well-formed and follows standard database practices.
Task description requires 4 rows documenting the 4 changes (CK_Track_Price, CK_Invoice_Total, CK_Customer_Email, and Country DEFAULT). Each row should have RuleId 1-4 with IsActive=TRUE.

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real public dataset (275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks, 59 customers, 412 invoices) downloaded from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. All metadata constraints are valid SQL constraint specifications: CK_Track_Price enforces Track.UnitPrice >= 0 (actual range 0.99-1.99), CK_Invoice_Total enforces Invoice.Total >= 0 (actual range 0.99-25.86), CK_Customer_Email checks Customer.Email contains '@' (all 59 emails verified as valid). The DEFAULT 'USA' for Customer.Country is reasonable (USA represents 22% of 59 customers). DataQualityRule table specification includes 5 columns with appropriate types and a requirement for exactly 4 documentation rows.
